titleStmt.title: SII 16.48: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 48. (A.R. No. 348 of 1922.) RAṄGASAMUDRAM, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock in a field to the south of the village.
The record which commences with the imprecatory verses, is dated in Śaka 1432, Kārtika śu. 12. If the cyclic year is Pramōda, the details may be equated to 1510 A.D., October 14, Monday.

It seems to record the remission of the marriage tax (peṇḍli-suṅkaṁ) on all the communities in Kaṁrnnāṭi-sīma, on the representation of Tippana, son of Nāgi-nāyuḍu, Chōlagāni Tātana and Golla Kasavana. Mentions Saḷuva Tiṁmarusaya and Ādepanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu rsṛpāṇāṁ . kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvā(ṁ) nētān
bhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrā(ṁ)n bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . dānapālana yōrmadhyē dānācchrē
yōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . yī dharmānaku yavaru dapinānu gōhatya brahmahatya cēsina pāpāna bōyinavāru maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrī
śubhamastu svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1432 Agunēṭi
da saṁvatsara kārttika śuda 12lu śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa śrīkṛṣṇarāya
mahārāyalu pṛthivirājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍagānu kaṁrnnāṭilōni nānā
vritula vārikiṁni peṁḍliśuṁkāla nimityamayi vivāhālu māni vuṁḍḍagānu kruṣṇadēva
mahārāyalaku prathāni sāḷuva tiṁmarusayyaku Ādepanāyaṁnigāriki ghaṁḍikōṭa śīmalōni
nāgināyanikoḍuku tippasa cōlagāni tātanayaragolla kasavana koḍuku būvana yī mu
kaṁrnnāṭikiṁ jellēṭi nānādurggāla śīmalakuṁnu peṁḍlisuṁkhālu lēkuṁḍānu viṁ
napaṁsēsi dhaṁrmaśāsanālu yipiṁcukoni Ācaṁdrārkkastāyigānu virūpākṣadēvara saṁniti
ni dhāravōsi vēyiṁcirigāna penugoṁḍarājyaṁ yyākuriki būmukoṁḍastaḷaṁ raṁgasamu
draṁ Agrahāraṁ vēyiṁcina dharmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
